subject: 72hrs left before it's over...
body:
There's ~72hrs left before the affiliate competition ends & spots are locked in.

This is where the leaderboard ranking shuffles up the most.

Reason being:

Now is the time that the other affiliates start firing their "secret weapons".

More specifically, what they do to win is...

- Blast their full email lists (multiple times),
- Ramp up their ad spend,
- Offer their own unique bonuses for opting in,
- and post all their videos & content, across all their socials.

Basically, they hold nothing back...

But why do they do this now - so late in the game?

Because they want to leverage urgency.

In the final 72 hours - that's where the highest % of people will likely opt in (because of how close the launch is).

I'm giving away the secrets of the top affiliates because I want you to win.

These were the top tactics affiliates used last launch.

The advantage you have now is that: you know what's about to go down.

So you can leverage the same tactics to help yourself win.

It's time to fire on all cylinders. Final stretch.

Good luck. You guys are incredible. (and super competitive)

Once again, thank you for helping us make real business education available to everyone.

Alex.
